modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: At initialization and each rising `samp` crossing, input trigger flags clear while the previous output is retained until a new edge pair is measured.
A measurement completes only after the required `inp` and `inn` rising-edge pair has been observed.
`vout` represents the `inp` minus `inn` edge-time delta with the specified polarity.
The reported timing delta uses the specified full-range scale rather than a half-range or alternate denominator.

title: TDC Ideal Edge Delta
